Related Entities

  • hospital CAPE FEAR VALLEY MEDICAL CENTER 1-star overall rating
  • hospital FAYETTEVILLE NC VA MEDICAL CENTER 3-star overall rating
  • hospital Womack AMC (FT Bragg)
  • snf Bethesda Health Care Facility 4-star, 85 beds
  • snf Whispering Pines Nursing & Rehab Center 5-star, 86 beds
  • snf Highland House Rehabilitation and Healthcare 1-star, 106 beds
  • snf Liberty Healthcare Services of Golden Years Nursin 3-star, 58 beds
  • snf The Carrolton of Fayetteville 2-star, 120 beds
  • snf Village Green Health and Rehabilitation 5-star, 170 beds
  • snf Haymount Rehabilitation & Nursing Center, Inc. 5-star, 98 beds
  • snf Woodlands Nursing & Rehabilitation Center 4-star, 80 beds
  • snf Carolina Rehab Center of Cumberland 2-star, 136 beds
  • snf Autumn Care of Fayetteville 5-star, 90 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
